title: Late Chunking: Contextual Chunk Embeddings for Long-Context Embedding Models

defines.name: late chunking
defines.definition: A chunking method that embeds an entire long document first and applies chunking only after the transformer encoder, before mean pooling, so each chunk embedding retains full document context.

problem: Naive chunking discards surrounding context and produces sub-optimal chunk embeddings for retrieval when meaning depends on neighboring text.
